source_formulae: P0R03502: The value of can be seen as a measure of the "coupling affinity" of a system. The teleological drive of the universe, which seeks to maximise coherence and complexity, is therefore a drive to create substrates with ever-higher values of . This is because high- systems are the most effective and potent vehicles for the universal consciousness (Psis) to experience and interact with the manifest world. The universe is actively building better and better partners for itself to dance with.
